data.content: Implemented the Dispatch > Advanced pool row layout fix in the feature worktree. PoolAgentRow now uses a content-aware CSS grid so multi-pill agent labels size from rendered content instead of the old fixed 140px/220px column, which prevents the adjacent weight input from overlapping. Added settings-pools-layout.test.ts to lock in the new grid contract and removal of the fixed-width label column. Validation: bun run lint; bunx tsc --noEmit; bun run test; bun run build.
